customer_vision: Erik Munson (owner-operator) wants real-time production and sales visibility on his tablet. Very practical vision — no over-engineering.
business_objectives: Real-time production dashboard for plant floor
CFO financial dashboard replacing 40 Excel reports
success_criteria: CFO signs off on data accuracy vs. GL
risks: MES system has no API — requires ODBC connector
pitfalls: Client has very limited IT staff — 2 people total
key_decisions: Fabric Direct Lake for production data — no data warehouse layer needed
delivery_notes: Keep it simple. Erik wants a tablet dashboard, not an enterprise analytics program. Scope creep is the #1 risk — say no to anything not in the SOW.
